game_info.title: Sonic Rush
game_info.concept: **ソニック・ザ・ヘッジホッグ 2** Sonic The Hedgehog 2 is a fast-paced 2D side-scrolling platformer where players control Sonic using an on-screen virtual D-pad for horizontal movement and a jump button to leap, with a second tap activating a spin dash. Levels are filled with loops, springs, and enemies, which are defeated by jumping on them or using a spin attack, while collecting 100 rings grants an extra life and rings protect from single hits. Progression involves completing multiple zones, each with 2-3 acts culminating in a boss battle against Dr. Eggman, with difficulty scaling through increasingly complex level layouts and enemy patterns. Collecting 50 rings and entering a giant ring grants access to a 3D half-pipe Special Stage to collect 7 Chaos Emeralds, which unlock the Super Sonic transformation. Players lose a life if they take damage without rings or fall into a pit, and the game ends upon losing all lives or defeating the final boss.
game_info.description: Race through colorful zones as Sonic the Hedgehog! Collect golden rings for protection and points, defeat enemies by jumping on them, and navigate through loops and platforms. Reach the goal post at the end of each act to progress. Lose all your rings when hit by an enemy, and lose a life if you're hit without rings. Collect 100 rings for an extra life. Complete all acts and defeat Dr. Eggman to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/A: Move left
Arrow Right/D: Move right
Space/W: Jump (press again in air for spin dash attack)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement mechanics and ring collection. This verifies that Sonic can move left/right, jump, and collect rings properly. Also tests that the camera follows the player and rings increment the score.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right continuously while jumping to collect rings scattered throughout the level. Alternate between moving right and jumping to test both horizontal and vertical movement. Collect at least 20 rings to verify the collection system works.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Sonic should move smoothly in both directions, jump when commanded, and the ring counter should increment for each ring collected. The camera should follow Sonic as he moves through the level. Test is successful when rings are collected and movement feels responsive.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing win condition by reaching the goal post quickly. This verifies that the level completion system works and transitions to the win state properly. Also tests continuous right movement and automated navigation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Hold right arrow continuously and jump periodically to avoid obstacles and maintain momentum. The automated test will push Sonic forward through the level rapidly to reach the goal post at the end of Act 1.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Sonic should reach the goal post and trigger the win condition, transitioning to GAME_OVER_WIN state. The game should display a victory message with the final score. Test is successful when the goal is reached and win state is displayed within a reasonable time frame.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing enemy collision and damage system. This verifies that touching enemies causes damage, rings are lost, and the player becomes temporarily invincible after being hit. Also tests that being hit without rings causes a life loss.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Move right until encountering an enemy, then deliberately collide with it while having rings. Observe ring loss and invincibility period. Then attempt to get hit again without rings to test life loss mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: First hit should scatter all rings and make Sonic invincible briefly. Second hit without rings should reduce lives. Test is successful when damage system works correctly and invincibility frames prevent immediate consecutive damage.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing spin dash attack mechanics. This verifies that pressing jump again while in the air activates the spin dash, which can defeat enemies on contact. Also tests that the visual indicator for spin dash is displayed.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Jump near an enemy, then press jump again in mid-air to activate spin dash. Attempt to collide with the enemy while in spin dash mode. Repeat with multiple enemies to verify consistent behavior.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Spin dash should activate with a visual indicator. Enemies hit during spin dash should be destroyed without damaging Sonic. Test is successful when enemies are defeated by spin dash and Sonic takes no damage.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing the extra life system at 100 rings. This verifies that collecting 100 rings grants an additional life and the ring counter resets to 0. Also tests that the lives counter updates correctly.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Collect rings continuously by moving through the level, jumping to reach elevated rings. Count should reach 100 and trigger the extra life reward. Continue collecting to verify the counter reset works.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Upon reaching 100 rings, lives should increment by 1 and rings should reset to 0. A visual/textual indication should appear. Test is successful when the life is granted and counters update correctly.
TEST_5.description: Testing the extra life system at 100 rings. This verifies that collecting 100 rings grants an additional life and the ring counter resets to 0. Also tests that the lives counter updates correctly.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing pause functionality. This verifies that pressing ESC pauses the game, freezes all movement and physics, and displays a pause overlay. Also tests that pressing ESC again resumes gameplay.
TEST_6.strategy_description: During active gameplay, press ESC to pause. Verify that all entities stop moving. Press ESC again to resume and verify gameplay continues from the same state.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Game should freeze completely when paused, displaying "PAUSED" overlay. All physics and animations should stop. Pressing ESC again should resume without any state loss. Test is successful when pause/unpause works seamlessly.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing game over conditions. This verifies that losing all lives triggers GAME_OVER_LOSE state, and that the restart functionality returns to the start screen properly. Also tests that game state resets correctly.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Losing all lives should display game over screen with final score. Pressing R should return to start screen. Starting a new game should reset lives, rings, and score to initial values. Test is successful when game over and restart cycle works correctly.
